category_sources: source_facts.description says fast and flexible scripting for Go developers and DevOps; official Risor site describes Risor as scripting for Go developers and DevOps, and official GitHub README describes it as an embeddable scripting language for Go applications.
display_name_sources: Official Risor homepage and repository title use Risor capitalization; source_facts.name is risor.
docs_sources: Official Risor site has Docs navigation and documentation sections; official GitHub README also includes documentation links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated with https://github.com/deepnoodle-ai/risor; per instruction it was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions scripting for Go developers and DevOps; official Risor site describes CLI, cloud, database, JSON, HTTP, and automation-oriented scripting.
